overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character in Western attire walking through a rainy historic city resembling New Orleans. The character navigates wet cobblestone streets, passes streetcars and horse-drawn carriages, and moves from covered arcades to open intersections and tree-lined boulevards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with red pillars

events.description: exits the covered arcade into the open cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade and emerging onto the rainy street, passing pedestrians in period clothing

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray coat and hat walking past the camera
historic streetcar stationary on the tracks to the left

entered.detail: wooden roof structure with red support pillars providing shelter from rain
tall red wooden pillars supporting the arcade roof
dark wooden streetcar with large windows sitting on tracks
raised wooden walkway in front of the buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered arcade with red wooden pillars sheltering the area from heavy rain. The character walks forward, passing pedestrians in period clothing, and emerges onto an open cobblestone street where a historic streetcar sits on tracks to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with tram tracks and balconies

events.description: passes a horse-drawn carriage parked on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the muddy cobblestone street, navigating past storefronts and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with canvas cover parked by the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story building with ornate iron balcony and weathered facade
wooden carriage with canvas cover and large wheels parked on the street
wooden telegraph poles with multiple cross-arms and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open cobblestone street, the character passes historic buildings with ornate iron balconies on the right. A horse-drawn carriage is parked by the sidewalk, and wooden utility poles line the street. The streetcar remains visible in the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with tram tracks and distinctive pink building

events.description: historic streetcar passes by on the left, moving along the intersection tracks
turns left at the intersection onto a tree-lined boulevard

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection while observing the pink building ahead, then turning left onto a new street

notable_agents.action: historic streetcar moving along the tracks crossing the intersection

entered.detail: distinctive two-story pink building with green shutters and red roof visible ahead
low brick wall with green plants and flowers
crossing streetcar tracks embedded in the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide intersection where a distinctive pink building stands prominently ahead. A streetcar moves along the tracks crossing the intersection from left to right. After passing a brick planter on the right, the character turns left onto a new street.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential boulevard with tree median and mansions

events.description: passes a red stop sign on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the tree-lined boulevard, passing a stop sign and continuing along the wet cobblestones past residential mansions

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign mounted on a metal pole
grass strip with mature oak trees dividing the boulevard
black wrought iron fence running along the left sidewalk
large two-story house with porch and columns set back from the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking down a residential boulevard with a tree-lined median and large mansions. A stop sign appears on the right, and an iron fence runs along the left sidewalk. The street is quieter here, with no vehicles or pedestrians visible, emphasizing the rainy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban arcade into the open, rain-slicked streets of a historic city, eventually settling into a quiet residential boulevard. It begins under a covered walkway with red wooden pillars, moving past pedestrians before emerging onto an open cobblestone street where a historic streetcar sits on its tracks. As the camera advances, the scene opens up to reveal ornate iron balconies and a parked horse-drawn carriage, with the streetcar receding into the distance. The movement then leads toward a wide intersection dominated by a prominent pink building and a crossing streetcar, before turning left past a brick planter. Finally, the environment shifts into a serene residential area characterized by large mansions, a tree-lined median, and iron fences under the steady rain.
